title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 8.670 - Resolution of board required for issuance of bonds
text:
8.670.  Resolution of board required for issuance of bonds. — Bonds may be issued under the provisions of sections 8.660 to 8.670 pursuant to a resolution adopted by the affirmative vote of two-thirds of the members of the board and no other proceedings shall be required therefor.
(L. 2003 H.B. 401 § 8.649) 
Effective 2-26-03
